stemHtml: When holding at an NDB, you are approaching the beacon on the inbound leg. How will you know when to initiate the turn?

options.a: The head of the needle will be pointing TO the fix and the needle will turn 180° when passed it.
options.b: The head of the needle will be pointing away from the fix and the needle will turn 180° when passed it.
options.c: The TO indication will become a FROM indication after passing the fix.
options.d: The indicator will go from full left deflection to full right deflection when passing the fix.
